title: pleopeltis bradei
intro: Pleopeltis bradei, also known as Brade's polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Brazil. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pleopeltis bradei can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used to treat various health conditions.
